name: task-orchestrator
author: jdrhyne
description: Autonomous multi-agent task orchestration with dependency analysis, parallel tmux/Codex execution, and self-healing heartbeat monitoring. Use for large projects with multiple issues/tasks that need coordinated parallel execution.

name: todo-tracker
author: jdrhyne
description: Persistent TODO scratch pad for tracking tasks across sessions. Use when user says "add to TODO", "what's on the TODO", "mark X done", "show TODO list", "remove from TODO", or asks about pending tasks. Also triggers on heartbeat to remind about stale items.

name: api-connector
author: jduncan-rva
description: Connect to REST APIs, manage authentication, and process responses. Use for API integration tasks.

name: code-formatter
author: jduncan-rva
description: Formats code files using prettier and eslint. Use when the user wants to format code, fix linting issues, or clean up code style.
_original_description: A simple example skill for demonstration purposes

name: typescript-pro
author: jeffallan
description: Use when building TypeScript applications requiring advanced type systems, generics, or full-stack type safety. Invoke for type guards, utility types, tRPC integration, monorepo setup.

name: core
author: jeffh
description: PAI (Personal AI Infrastructure) - Your AI system core. AUTO-LOADS at session start. USE WHEN any session begins OR user asks about PAI identity, response format, stack preferences, security protocols, or delegation patterns.

name: create-skill
author: jeffh
description: Create, update, validate, and canonicalize Claude Code skills. USE WHEN user wants to create a new skill OR modify an existing skill OR validate skill structure OR fix skill format OR migrate legacy skills.

name: create-worktree
author: jeffh
description: Creates a new git/jj worktree for development work with proper setup, dependencies, and optional thoughts initialization. Use when user needs to create a new worktree for feature development or bug fixes.

name: fabric
author: jeffh
description: Native Fabric pattern execution for Claude Code. USE WHEN processing content with Fabric patterns (extract_wisdom, summarize, analyze_claims, threat modeling, etc.). Patterns run natively in Claude's context - no CLI spawning needed. Only use fabric CLI for YouTube transcripts (-y) or pattern updates (-U).

name: research
author: jeffh
description: Comprehensive research, analysis, and content extraction system. Multi-source parallel research using available researcher agents. Deep content analysis with extended thinking. Intelligent retrieval for difficult sites. Fabric pattern selection for 242+ specialized prompts. USE WHEN user says 'do research', 'extract wisdom', 'analyze content', 'find information about', or requests web/content research.

name: spec-metadata
author: jeffh
description: Generates metadata for research documents and specifications including date/time, git commit, branch, and repository info. Use when creating research documents, handoffs, or any documentation that needs timestamp and git metadata.

name: api-security
author: jefflester
description: API security best practices and common vulnerability prevention. Enforces security checks for authentication, input validation, SQL injection, XSS, and OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. Use when building or modifying APIs.

name: git-workflow
author: jefflester
description: Git workflow best practices including commit messages, branching strategies, pull requests, and collaboration patterns. Use when working with Git version control.

name: python-best-practices
author: jefflester
description: Python development best practices including PEP 8 style guidelines, type hints, docstring conventions, and common patterns. Use when writing or modifying Python code.

name: skill-developer
author: jefflester
description: Create and manage Claude Code skills following Anthropic best practices. Use when creating new skills, modifying skill-rules.json, understanding trigger patterns, working with hooks, debugging skill activation, or implementing progressive disclosure. Covers skill structure, YAML frontmatter, keyword triggers, hook mechanisms (UserPromptSubmit), session tracking, and the 500-line rule.

name: ai-consultation
author: jeffrigby
description: Provides AI consultation workflows, prompt templates, and best practices for multi-model consultation. Use when user asks for "second opinion", "ask codex", "ask gemini", "AI code review", "external AI consultation", or needs prompt templates for code review, security audit, or architecture analysis.

name: code-auditing
author: jeffrigby
description: Provides code auditing methodology, checklists, and best practices. Use when user asks to "audit code", "find technical debt", "security review", "identify dead code", "analyze code quality", or "check best practices".

name: docs-maintenance
author: jeffrigby
description: Keep project documentation current and optimized for AI agents. Use when user asks to "update docs", "sync documentation", "update CLAUDE.md", "update README", "check documentation freshness", "document recent changes", or "optimize docs for AI".

name: adr
author: jellydn
description: Manages Architecture Decision Records (ADR) for tracking important architectural decisions

name: codemap
author: jellydn
description: Orchestrate parallel codebase analysis to produce 7 structured documents about the codebase in .planning/codebase/

name: handoffs
author: jellydn
description: Creates detailed handoff plans of conversations for continuing work in new sessions

name: pickup
author: jellydn
description: Resumes work from a previous handoff session which are stored in `.claude/handoffs/`

name: pr-review
author: jellydn
description: Fix PR review comments by implementing requested changes

name: qmd-knowledge
author: jellydn
description: Project-specific knowledge management system using qmd MCP server. Captures learnings, issue notes, and conventions in a searchable knowledge base.

name: slop
author: jellydn
description: Removes AI-generated code slop from git diffs to maintain code quality

name: tdd
author: jellydn
description: Guides through the complete TDD workflow with Red-Green-Refactor cycle

name: adk-agent-builder
author: jeremylongshore
description: Build production-ready AI agents using Google's Agent Development Kit with Claude integration, React patterns, multi-agent orchestration, and comprehensive tool libraries

name: gastown
author: jeremylongshore
description:
Manage multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code. Use when user mentions gastown, gas town,
gt commands, bd commands, convoys, polecats, crew, rigs, slinging work, multi-agent
coordination, beads, hooks, molecules, workflows, the witness, the mayor, the refinery,
the deacon, dogs, escalation, or wants to run multiple AI agents on projects simultaneously.
Handles installation, workspace setup, work tracking, agent lifecycle, crash recovery,
and all gt/bd CLI operations. Trigger with phrases like "gas town", "gt sling", "fire up the engine".
description_zh: Gastown是一个基于Go的多智能体编排系统，用于Claude Code的并行任务执行。通过beads跟踪工作，使用polecats和crew管理代理生命周期，并通过Refinery处理自动代码合并。需要安装Go和终端访问权限。
_original_description: Gastown is a Go-based multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code that enables parallel task execution. It provides work tracking through beads, manages agent lifecycles via polecats and crew, and handles automated code merging through the Refinery. Requires Go installation and terminal access.

name: splitting-datasets
author: jeremylongshore
description: Process split datasets into training, validation, and testing sets for ML model development. Use when requesting "split dataset", "train-test split", or "data partitioning". Trigger with relevant phrases based on skill purpose.
description_zh: 该技能通过生成Python代码自动将CSV数据集分割为训练集、验证集和测试集，支持常见比例划分，为机器学习工作流提供数据预处理支持。
_original_description: This skill automates dataset splitting for ML workflows by generating Python code to create training, validation, and test sets from CSV files. It handles common split ratios and produces separate output files for each subset.

name: zai-cli
author: jeremylongshore
description:
Execute z.AI CLI providing vision, search, reader, and GitHub exploration via CLI and MCP.
Use when user needs image/video analysis, OCR, UI-to-code conversion, error diagnosis,
real-time web search, web page to markdown extraction, or GitHub code exploration.
Trigger with phrases like "analyze this image", "search the web for", "read this page",
"explore this repo", or "use zai". Requires Z_AI_API_KEY.
description_zh: 该技能通过CLI提供Z.AI的多模态能力，包括图像/视频分析、OCR、实时网页搜索和GitHub代码探索。通过MCP协议与Claude Code集成，默认输出原始数据，支持JSON格式。需要API密钥和Node.js环境。
_original_description: This skill provides CLI access to Z.AI's multimodal capabilities including image/video analysis, OCR, web search, and GitHub exploration. It integrates with Claude Code via MCP, offering raw data output by default with JSON formatting option. Requires API key setup and Node.js environment.

name: color-palette
author: jezweb
description: Generate complete, accessible colour palettes from a single brand hex. Produces 11-shade scale (50-950), semantic tokens, dark mode variants, and Tailwind v4 CSS output. Includes WCAG contrast checking. Use when setting up design systems, creating Tailwind themes, building brand colours from a hex value, or checking colour accessibility.
description_zh: 从单一品牌色生成完整的11级色阶、语义化设计令牌和深色模式变量，包含WCAG对比度检查。直接输出Tailwind v4主题语法。
_original_description:
Generate complete, accessible color palettes from a single brand hex. Creates 11-shade scale (50-950), semantic tokens (background, foreground, card, muted), and dark mode variants. Includes WCAG contrast checking for text accessibility.

Use when: setting up design system, creating Tailwind theme, building brand colors from single hex, converting designs to code, checking color accessibility.

name: elevenlabs-agents
author: jezweb
description: Build conversational AI voice agents with ElevenLabs Platform. Workflow: configure agent, add tools and knowledge base, integrate SDK, test, deploy. Supports React, React Native, and Swift SDKs. Use when building voice agents, AI phone systems, or troubleshooting @11labs deprecated packages, webhook errors, CSP violations, localhost allowlist, or tool parsing errors.
description_zh: 提供使用ElevenLabs平台构建语音代理的详细指南，涵盖SDK设置、代理配置和27个具体错误解决方案。包含包更新、React/React Native/Swift集成和Webhook故障排除。
_original_description:
Build conversational AI voice agents with ElevenLabs Platform. Configure agents, tools, RAG knowledge bases, multi-voice, and Scribe STT across React, React Native, or Swift. Prevents 34 documented errors.

Use when: building voice agents, AI phone systems, or troubleshooting @11labs deprecated, webhook errors, CSP violations, localhost allowlist, tool parsing errors.

name: favicon-gen
author: jezweb
description: Generate custom favicons from logos, text, or brand colours. Produces all required formats: favicon.svg, favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon.png, icon-192/512.png, and web manifest. Use when initialising websites, replacing CMS default favicons, converting logos to favicons, creating branded icons from initials, or troubleshooting favicon not displaying, iOS black square, or missing manifest.
description_zh: 提供从Logo、文本或品牌色生成完整网站图标集的清晰步骤指南。涵盖SVG创建、多格式转换（ICO、PNG）和清单生成，包含iOS/Android兼容性规则。提供决策树、模板和故障排除建议。
_original_description:
Generate custom favicons from logos, text, or brand colors - prevents launching with CMS defaults. Extract icons from logos, create monogram favicons from initials, or use branded shapes. Outputs all required formats: favicon.svg, favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon.png, and web app manifest.

Use when: initializing new websites, replacing WordPress/CMS default favicons, converting logos to favicons, creating branded icons from text only, or troubleshooting favicon not displaying, iOS icon transparency, or missing manifest files.

name: project-health
author: jezweb
description: All-in-one project configuration and health management. Sets up new projects (settings.local.json, CLAUDE.md, .gitignore), audits existing projects (permissions, context quality, MCP coverage, leaked secrets, stale docs), tidies accumulated cruft, captures session learnings, and adds permission presets. Uses sub-agents for heavy analysis to keep main context clean. Trigger with 'project health', 'check project', 'setup project', 'kickoff', 'bootstrap', 'tidy permissions', 'clean settings', 'capture learnings', 'audit context', 'add python permissions', or 'init project'.
_original_description:
AI-agent readiness auditing for project documentation and workflows. Evaluates whether
future Claude Code sessions can understand docs, execute workflows literally, and resume
work effectively. Use when onboarding AI agents to a project or ensuring context continuity.

Includes three specialized agents: context-auditor (AI-readability), workflow-validator
(process executability), handoff-checker (session continuity). Use PROACTIVELY before
handing off projects to other AI sessions or team members.

name: tanstack-start
author: jezweb
description: Build a full-stack TanStack Start app on Cloudflare Workers from scratch — SSR, file-based routing, server functions, D1+Drizzle, better-auth, Tailwind v4+shadcn/ui. No template repo — Claude generates every file fresh per project.
description_zh: 用于在Cloudflare Workers上使用TanStack Start构建全栈React应用的技能。提供类型安全路由、服务器函数、SSR/流式渲染和D1/KV/R2集成。目前处于候选发布版本状态，内存泄漏问题已修复。包含详细的稳定性跟踪和监控说明。
_original_description:
Build full-stack React apps with TanStack Start on Cloudflare Workers. Type-safe routing, server functions, SSR/streaming, D1/KV/R2 integration.

Use when building full-stack React apps with SSR, migrating from Next.js, or from Vinxi to Vite (v1.121.0+). Prevents 9 documented errors including middleware bugs, file upload limitations, and deployment config issues.

name: moai-baas-vercel-ext
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Vercel Edge Platform with AI-powered deployment, Context7 integration
description_zh: 企业级Vercel边缘平台技能，提供AI驱动的部署、全球CDN配置、Next.js优化和Context7集成，用于构建具有边缘计算能力的高性能可扩展Web应用。

name: moai-cc-configuration
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise configuration management with Zod/Pydantic validation
description_zh: 用于管理企业级应用配置和机密的技能。它提供TypeScript（Zod）和Python（Pydantic）验证模式、Docker/Kubernetes设置以及安全的机密管理实践。

name: moai-cloud-aws-advanced
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Advanced AWS container and serverless architectures for ECS/EKS orchestration, Lambda patterns, EventBridge workflows, and production deployments. Use when implementing AWS infrastructure, containers, or serverless.
description_zh: 一个Claude技能，提供AWS容器和无服务器架构的高级指导，包括ECS/EKS编排、Lambda模式、EventBridge工作流和生产部署最佳实践。

name: moai-cloud-gcp-advanced
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Advanced GCP patterns for Cloud Run, Vertex AI, BigQuery, and GKE
description_zh: 提供Google云平台高级架构模式和实现指南，涵盖Cloud Run、Vertex AI、BigQuery和GKE等服务，用于企业级无服务器、机器学习和分析解决方案。

name: moai-core-agent-guide
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Complete guide to MoAI-ADK agents, delegation patterns, and agent orchestration for intelligent task distribution
description_zh: 关于MoAI智能体架构、任务委派模式和编排策略的完整指南，用于开发工作流中的智能任务分发、并行执行和上下文管理。

name: moai-core-code-reviewer
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise systematic code review orchestrator with TRUST 5 principles, multi-language support, Context7 integration, AI-powered quality checks, SOLID principle validation, security vulnerability detection, and maintainability analysis across 25+ programming languages; activates for code reviews, quality standard validation, TRUST 5 enforcement, architectural audits, and automated review automation
description_zh: 企业级代码审查协调器，系统应用TRUST 5原则，验证SOLID原则，检测安全漏洞，并在25+编程语言中分析可维护性。

name: moai-core-context-budget
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Context window management and token budget optimization
description_zh: 该技能提供管理有限LLM上下文窗口的策略，专注于令牌预算优化、高效文件查看、对话摘要和内存管理，适用于Claude 3.5 Sonnet的20万令牌限制。

name: moai-core-env-security
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Environment variable security, secrets management, and secure credential handling for MoAI-ADK projects
description_zh: 为软件项目提供环境变量和密钥的安全管理方案，涵盖本地.env文件、生产环境保险库集成以及安全标准合规性。

name: moai-core-feedback-templates
author: jg-chalk-io
description:
GitHub 이슈 라벨별 구조화된 템플릿. 버그, 기능 요청, 개선 사항, 리팩토링, 문서, 질문 등
각 이슈 타입에 맞는 한국어 템플릿 제공. /alfred:9-feedback에서 사용.
description_zh: 一套结构化的韩语GitHub问题创建模板集合，用于提交错误报告、功能请求、改进建议、重构计划和文档更新。

name: moai-core-issue-labels
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise GitHub issue labeling orchestrator with semantic label taxonomy, AI-powered auto-labeling, label hierarchy system, workflow automation, issue triage acceleration, and stakeholder communication; activates for issue classification, label management, workflow automation, priority assignment, and team communication
description_zh: 企业级GitHub问题管理系统，利用语义分类法和AI自动标注，加速问题分类和流程自动化。

name: moai-core-language-detection
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Auto-detects project language and framework from package.json, pyproject.toml, Cargo.toml, go.mod, and other configuration files with comprehensive pattern matching based on 17,253+ production code examples.
description_zh: 通过分析项目配置文件（如 package.json 和 pyproject.toml），基于大量代码示例的模式匹配，自动检测编程语言和框架。

name: moai-core-personas
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Adaptive communication patterns and role selection based on user expertise level and request type. Use for personalized user interactions, expertise detection, and dynamic communication adaptation.
description_zh: 该Claude技能可根据用户专业水平和请求类型动态选择沟通角色，实现个性化交互，提供从详细指导到高效执行的自适应沟通模式。

name: moai-core-proactive-suggestions
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Proactive suggestions for code quality, security, and best practices
description_zh: 该Claude技能自动分析代码，主动提供改进质量、安全性、性能和最佳实践的建议。它能检测模式、优先处理问题并提供可操作的修复方案。

name: moai-core-rules
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Core rules for Alfred SuperAgent - 3-Layer Architecture, 4-Step Workflow, Agent-First
description_zh: 定义了智能体开发系统的核心规则，包括三层架构、四步工作流和质量关卡。它强制执行委托和结构化执行模式，用于构建AI智能体。

name: moai-core-todowrite-pattern
author: jg-chalk-io
description: TodoWrite pattern for incremental implementation and placeholder management
description_zh: 一种结构化方法，使用占位符注释（TodoWrite）来分解复杂开发任务，进行脚手架搭建、增量实现并跟踪完成进度。

name: moai-core-workflow
author: jg-chalk-io
description:
Enterprise multi-agent workflow orchestration specialist. Master workflow 
design, agent coordination, task delegation, and process automation with Context7 
MCP integration and comprehensive monitoring. Build scalable, intelligent 
workflow systems with fault tolerance and performance optimization.
description_zh: 企业级多智能体工作流编排工具，专注于设计、协调和自动化复杂流程，集成Context7 MCP，提供监控和容错功能，用于构建可扩展的系统。

name: moai-docs-unified
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Unified documentation validation ecosystem with AI-powered features
description_zh: 一个统一的文档验证生态系统，可自动化检查 Markdown 语法、Mermaid 图表和韩语排版，并提供集成报告与 CI/CD 支持。

name: moai-domain-frontend
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Frontend Development with modern architecture and scalable UI patterns
description_zh: 一个专注于企业级前端开发的技能，精通React、Vue和Angular等现代框架，擅长可扩展架构、状态管理、性能优化和可访问性。

name: moai-domain-iot
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise IoT patterns with MQTT, Edge Computing, and Device Management
description_zh: 提供企业级物联网架构模式和实施指南，涵盖MQTT、边缘计算、设备管理和安全，包含生产就绪的Python代码示例，用于构建可扩展系统。

name: moai-domain-monitoring
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Observability with Prometheus, Grafana, logging, and tracing
description_zh: 一个用于使用Prometheus、Grafana、Loki和OpenTelemetry等工具实施和管理生产环境监控与可观测性（指标、日志、追踪）的Claude技能。

name: moai-essentials-perf
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Performance optimization with profiling, memory analysis, and benchmarking
description_zh: 性能优化技能，提供系统化方法识别和修复瓶颈，涵盖性能剖析、基准测试和优化技术，支持多种编程语言和系统。

name: moai-foundation-ears
author: jg-chalk-io
description: EARS (Easy Approach to Requirements Syntax) format for clear requirements
description_zh: 一项使用EARS（简易需求语法）格式编写清晰、可测试需求的技能。它提供五种需求类型的模板和消除歧义的指导原则。

name: moai-foundation-git
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Git workflows, branching strategies, and commit conventions
description_zh: 一个Git工作流专家技能，提供版本控制最佳实践，包括分支策略、约定式提交格式、PR工作流以及适用于生产级开发的团队协作标准。

name: moai-foundation-langs
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Programming language detection and setup patterns
description_zh: 通过分析文件扩展名和配置文件，自动检测项目中的编程语言和技术栈，并为开发提供相应的设置说明和工具推荐。

name: moai-foundation-specs
author: jg-chalk-io
description: SPEC writing standards with EARS format and TAG traceability
description_zh: 一个使用EARS格式和基于TAG的可追溯性来编写清晰、可测试软件需求的标准化框架，用于连接规范、测试、代码和文档。

name: moai-foundation-trust
author: jg-chalk-io
description: TRUST 4 principles - Test First, Readable, Unified, Secured
description_zh: 一个基础技能，强制执行四个核心软件质量原则：测试先行、可读性、统一性和安全性。它为构建安全、可维护且高覆盖率的代码提供标准、示例和自动化检查。

name: moai-lang-c
author: jg-chalk-io
description: C programming language patterns, memory management, and systems programming
description_zh: 一个专注于C编程语言的Claude技能，涵盖内存管理、系统编程、性能优化和底层数据结构。它提供编写高效、健壮的C应用程序的最佳实践。

name: moai-lang-cpp
author: jg-chalk-io
description: C++23 best practices with Google Test 1.15, clang-format 19, and modern
description_zh: 一个用于C++23开发的Claude技能，强制执行最佳实践，集成Google Test 1.15和clang-format 19，支持TDD工作流，并确保TRUST 5质量合规。

name: moai-lang-csharp
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise C# 13 development with .NET 9, async/await, LINQ, Entity Framework
description_zh: 专注于企业级C# 13开发的Claude技能，使用.NET 9，涵盖异步编程、LINQ、Entity Framework Core、ASP.NET Core以及可扩展后端服务的生产就绪模式，支持实时文档访问。

name: moai-lang-dart
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Dart 3.5 enterprise development with Flutter 3.24, advanced async programming,
description_zh: 一款用于企业级Dart 3.5和Flutter 3.24开发的Claude技能，包含高级异步编程、现代状态管理模式（BLoC、Riverpod）、跨平台移动开发，并通过Context7 MCP集成提供实时文档访问。

name: moai-lang-elixir
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Elixir and Phoenix framework best practices for concurrent systems, OTP patterns, LiveView applications, and production deployment. Use when building Elixir/Phoenix applications or concurrent systems.
description_zh: 该技能为使用Elixir编程语言和Phoenix Web框架构建生产级应用提供专家指导，涵盖OTP模式、用于实时界面的LiveView以及并发系统的部署最佳实践。

name: moai-lang-go
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Go for systems and network programming Go 1.25.4, Fiber v3,
description_zh: 该技能提供企业级Go语言开发能力，专注于系统和网络编程，包含Go 1.25.4、Fiber v3框架、并发模式及高性能应用构建工具。

name: moai-lang-java
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Java programming language patterns, object-oriented design, and enterprise
description_zh: 一个用于Java编程的Claude技能，专注于面向对象设计模式、企业应用开发、JVM优化、Spring框架集成和Android开发。

name: moai-lang-kotlin
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Kotlin 2.0 Multiplatform Enterprise Development with KMP, Coroutines,
description_zh: 用于企业级Kotlin 2.0多平台开发的Claude技能，涵盖KMP架构、Compose UI、协程和现代模式，并通过Context7 MCP集成实现实时文档访问。

name: moai-lang-php
author: jg-chalk-io
description: PHP 8.4+ best practices with PHPUnit 11, Composer, PSR-12 standards,
description_zh: 一个用于PHP 8.4+开发的Claude技能，强制执行PHPUnit 11、Composer、PSR-12标准的最佳实践，支持Laravel/Symfony框架，包含TDD工作流和TRUST 5合规检查。

name: moai-lang-python
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise-grade Python expertise with production patterns for Python
description_zh: 企业级Python开发技能，专注于使用FastAPI、Django、异步模式和现代化部署。提供REST API、微服务、ORM、测试和生产部署的专业知识。

name: moai-lang-r
author: jg-chalk-io
description: R 4.4+ best practices with testthat 3.2, lintr 3.2, and data analysis
description_zh: 一个用于R编程的Claude技能，用于强制执行最佳实践，集成testthat和lintr测试，并支持具有质量保证和测试驱动开发方法论的数据分析工作流。

name: moai-lang-ruby
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Ruby 3.4+ best practices with RSpec 4, RuboCop 2, Bundler, and Rails
description_zh: 这是一个Claude技能，提供Ruby 3.4+开发最佳实践，包含RSpec 4、RuboCop 2、Bundler和Rails 8模式。它强制执行TRUST 5原则，支持TDD工作流程，并通过自动化审查和合规检查确保代码质量。

name: moai-lang-scala
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Scala 3.6+ best practices with ScalaTest 3.2, sbt 1.10, functional programming
description_zh: 一个专用于Scala 3.6+开发的Claude技能，提供最佳实践、ScalaTest 3.2测试、sbt 1.10构建自动化、函数式编程模式以及Play框架支持，并强制执行质量门禁。

name: moai-lang-shell
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Shell scripting with Bash 5.2, ShellCheck, bats-core testing,
description_zh: 该技能提供企业级Bash Shell脚本编写指导，包括现代Bash特性、ShellCheck静态分析、bats-core测试框架、防御性编程模式，以及系统管理和CI/CD自动化的最佳实践。

name: moai-lang-sql
author: jg-chalk-io
description: SQL best practices with pgTAP, sqlfluff 3.2, query optimization, and
description_zh: 该技能使用 pgTAP 和 sqlfluff 等工具来执行 SQL 最佳实践，包括查询优化、迁移管理，并通过测试驱动开发流程和高测试覆盖率确保代码质量。

name: moai-lang-swift
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Swift 6.0 enterprise development with async/await, SwiftUI, Combine,
description_zh: 专注于 Swift 6.0 企业级开发的技能，涵盖现代并发（async/await）、声明式UI框架 SwiftUI、响应式编程 Combine、服务器端 Vapor 以及企业架构模式，并提供实时文档访问。

name: moai-lang-typescript
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise TypeScript with strict typing and modern ecosystem TypeScript
description_zh: 一个用于企业级TypeScript开发的综合技能，专注于严格类型、Next.js 16和React 19等现代框架，以及使用tRPC和Zod构建类型安全的API和全栈应用。

name: moai-mermaid-diagram-expert
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Mermaid diagramming solution with 21 diagram types
description_zh: 一个企业级的Mermaid.js图表解决方案，支持流程图、序列图、类图、甘特图等21种图表类型，用于可视化流程、架构和数据模型。

name: moai-ml-llm-fine-tuning
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise LLM Fine-Tuning with LoRA, QLoRA, and PEFT techniques
description_zh: 该技能使用LoRA和QLoRA等参数高效微调技术，为企业级大语言模型提供微调服务，能以最小的计算资源实现领域适配。

name: moai-ml-rag
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation systems, vector databases, embedding strategies, and production RAG architectures for enterprise LLM applications. Use when building RAG, semantic search, or knowledge-aware AI systems.
description_zh: 该技能提供构建企业级检索增强生成（RAG）系统的专家指导，涵盖向量数据库、嵌入策略和生产架构，用于开发基于知识的AI应用。

name: moai-nextra-architecture
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Nextra (Next.js Docs Framework) architecture, MDX, and theme config
description_zh: 一个专注于实现和配置 Nextra（基于 Next.js 的文档框架）的专业技能。涵盖 MDX 编写、基于文件的路由、主题定制以及构建静态文档站点的最佳实践。

name: moai-observability-advanced
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Advanced observability patterns with OpenTelemetry, distributed tracing, eBPF monitoring, SLO/SLI implementation, and production strategies. Use when implementing observability, monitoring, or distributed tracing.
description_zh: 提供基于OpenTelemetry的高级可观测性实现指南，包括分布式追踪、eBPF监控和SLO/SLI生产策略。专注于指标、日志、追踪和错误预算管理。

name: moai-project-documentation
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enhanced project documentation with AI-powered features and Context7 integration
description_zh: 一个AI驱动的技能，用于创建全面的项目文档，包含自动化模板、Context7集成，并支持Web应用、移动应用和数据科学等多种项目类型。

name: moai-security-auth
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Modern authentication patterns with MFA, FIDO2, WebAuthn & Passkeys
description_zh: 一个专注于安全的Claude技能，提供现代身份验证模式的专家知识，包括MFA、FIDO2、WebAuthn和Passkeys。它为Web应用程序中的安全登录系统提供实施指导。

name: moai-security-devsecops
author: jg-chalk-io
description: SAST/DAST/SCA automation, CI/CD security pipelines, vulnerability management
description_zh: 该Claude技能通过将SAST、DAST和SCA工具集成到CI/CD管道中，实现DevSecOps安全测试自动化，用于漏洞管理和快速修复。

name: moai-security-ssrf
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise SSRF protection with URL validation and network segmentation
description_zh: 专注于企业级SSRF防护的Claude技能，通过URL验证、网络分段以及Python和TypeScript的安全编码模式，防止服务器端请求伪造攻击。

name: moai-security-threat
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Enterprise Skill for advanced development
description_zh: 一个专注于安全的技能，使用STRIDE框架进行系统化威胁建模，并为网络和应用安全创建自定义的入侵检测/防御规则。

name: moai-testing-load
author: jg-chalk-io
description: Load testing with k6, Gatling, performance benchmarking, and CI/CD integration. Use when testing performance, capacity, or implementing load tests.
description_zh: 该Claude技能提供使用k6和Gatling等工具进行负载测试和性能基准测试的指导。涵盖测试类型、CI/CD集成，并帮助为API和复杂用户流程实施性能测试。

name: backend-dev-guidelines
author: jhouser
description: Comprehensive backend development guide for Go/Chi/PostgreSQL with Clean Architecture. Use when creating routes, handlers, services, interfaces, middleware, working with Chi APIs, sqlc database access, JWT authentication, request validation, correlation IDs, or async patterns. Covers layered architecture (routes → handlers → services → database), interface-first development, error handling, observability, testing strategies, and service decomposition patterns.
description_zh: 为使用Chi路由、PostgreSQL与sqlc的Go后端开发提供具体实现模式。包含新功能和服务检查清单、分层架构图以及8个核心规则，配有正确与错误代码示例对比。
_original_description: Provides concrete implementation patterns for Go backend development using Chi router, PostgreSQL with sqlc, and Clean Architecture. Includes specific checklists for new features and services, layered architecture diagrams, and 8 key rules with code examples showing correct vs. incorrect approaches.

name: frontend-dev-guidelines
author: jhouser
description: Frontend development guidelines for ActionPhase React/TypeScript application. Modern patterns including Suspense, lazy loading, useSuspenseQuery, file organization with features directory, Tailwind CSS styling with custom UI components, React Router, dark mode with CSS variables, performance optimization, and TypeScript best practices. Use when creating components, pages, features, fetching data, styling, routing, or working with frontend code.
description_zh: 一份全面且结构清晰的前端开发指南，为团队提供明确的模式、实用检查清单和现代React/TypeScript最佳实践。
_original_description: A comprehensive and well-structured frontend development guide that provides clear patterns, practical checklists, and modern React/TypeScript best practices for team consistency.

name: route-tester
author: jhouser
description: Test authenticated API routes in ActionPhase using JWT Bearer token authentication. Use when testing API endpoints, validating route functionality, debugging authentication issues, or verifying request/response data. Includes patterns for using backend/scripts/api-test.sh and curl with proper authorization headers.
description_zh: 为ActionPhase中基于JWT认证的API路由测试提供具体模式。包含处理登录和令牌管理的shell脚本，以及GET、POST、PUT、DELETE操作的curl示例。涵盖角色创建、阶段转换等常见测试场景。
_original_description: Provides concrete patterns for testing JWT-authenticated API routes in ActionPhase. Includes a shell script that handles login and token management, plus manual curl examples for GET, POST, PUT, DELETE operations. Covers common testing scenarios like character creation and phase transitions.

name: code-docs
author: jjmartres
description: Apply Google Style documentation standards to Python, Go, and Terraform code. Use when writing or reviewing code that needs docstrings/comments, when asked to "document this code", "add docstrings", "follow Google Style", or when improving code documentation quality. Supports Python docstrings, Go comments, and Terraform variable/output descriptions. Enforces consistent, professional documentation standards.

name: datadog-cli
author: jjmartres
description: Use this skill when you need to search Datadog logs, query metrics, tail logs in real-time, trace distributed requests, investigate errors, compare time periods, find log patterns, check service health, or export observability data.

name: mcp-builder-skill
author: jjmartres
description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers that enable LLMs to interact with external services through well-designed tools. Use when building MCP servers to integrate external APIs or services, whether in Python (FastMCP) or Node/TypeScript (MCP SDK).

name: project-docs
author: jjmartres
description: Generate comprehensive, professional project documentation structures including README, ARCHITECTURE, USER_GUIDE, DEVELOPER_GUIDE, and CONTRIBUTING files. Use when the user requests project documentation creation, asks to "document a project", needs standard documentation files, or wants to set up docs for a new repository. Adapts to Python/Go projects and OpenSource/internal contexts.

name: work-on-ticket
author: jjmartres
description: Fetches Jira ticket details, creates an appropriately named branch, and initiates the task planning workflow. Use when the user says "work on [TICKET_ID]" or similar phrases.

name: repren
author: jlevy
description: Performs simultaneous multi-pattern search-and-replace, file/directory renaming, and case-preserving refactoring across codebases. Use for bulk refactoring, global find-and-replace, or when user mentions repren, multi-file rename, or pattern-based transformations.

name: fastmcp-client-cli
author: jlowin
description: Query and invoke tools on MCP servers using fastmcp list and fastmcp call. Use when you need to discover what tools a server offers, call tools, or integrate MCP servers into workflows.

name: reviewing-code
author: jlowin
description: Review code for quality, maintainability, and correctness. Use when reviewing pull requests, evaluating code changes, or providing feedback on implementations. Focuses on API design, patterns, and actionable feedback.
